---
title: "Humboldt County Regional Cost and Operational Assessment" 
subtitle: "2023-2025"
number: 77
image: /images/humboldt.jpg
image-alt: "Image of Humboldt County, California"
---
{{< include _return-to-pf.qmd >}}

::: {.article}
![](/images/humboldt.jpg){.left-img}

# 2023-2025 Humboldt County, California Regional Cost and Operational Assessment

Bell & Associates assisted the Cities of Eureka, Arcata, Fortuna, and Humboldt
County in calculating the cost of service for waste and recycling collection
prior to the countywide implementation of SB 1383 programs. Financial and
operational data were collected from the franchised hauler, and reports were
provided to the cities and Humboldt County detailing the cost of current
services. 

Service fees charged within the jurisdictions by the franchised hauler are
adjusted by a combination of CPI and disposal increases. With the
implementation of the state organic law, SB 1383, jurisdictions were required
to update their franchise agreements to provide a cost-of-service method for
reporting the results of collection operations and to update collection rates.
Mr. Bell provided the process for reporting the financial results of operations
within each franchise annually. Rather than layering the additional costs
associated with SB 1383, jurisdictions can establish baseline program
performance measures and costs to integrate the new program changes and be
accountable to their constituencies. 

# Humboldt County Regional Cost and Operational Assessment

The cities and Humboldt County contracted with Bell & Associates to assess Recology’s waste collection operations, evaluate the cost of collection services for each jurisdiction, establish cost of service collection rates, assist with updating the franchise contracts and updating the methods for annual rate adjustments, and determine the cost and rate impacts of implementing SB 1383, California’s organic collection law.

Thumbnail image attribution:
[Bdonjc - Own work, CC BY-SA 4.0](https://commons.wikimedia.org/w/index.php?curid=112642181)
:::
